overview: eMSME is a digital platform connecting MSMEs, startups, and entrepreneurs in India to 600+ government schemes, funding, compliance services, and expert consultation. The site generates leads, promotes services, builds trust, and guides users to discover eligible schemes.
features: Interactive MSME scheme eligibility tool with dynamic filtering
About page with mission, vision, leadership, and timeline
Detailed services page with benefits, process steps, and per-section CTAs
Partners showcase with government and banking associations
Resources hub with blog, FAQs, and downloadable guides
Contact page with lead form, WhatsApp CTA, and map embed placeholder
Mobile-first responsive design matching homepage style
